heading: Omitted
label: 1205 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided for certain moneys withheld from per capita distribution to be credited to a joint account for expenditure for official salaries and expenses of Fort Peck Tribes, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 91–283, § 584 Stat. 313June 19, 1970
